pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

elite.name: Elite
features: Direct line to our quant team

q1.a: PolyPulse is a suite of intelligent trading bots and signal tools designed specifically for Polymarket prediction markets. We help you trade smarter with automated strategies, real-time alerts, and data-driven insights.

q2.a: Not at all. Our bots do the heavy lifting. You choose a plan, connect your wallet, and the bot handles entries, exits, and risk management. We also provide educational resources to get you started.

q3.a: We use a combination of on-chain data analysis, market sentiment tracking, whale wallet monitoring, and proprietary AI models to generate high-confidence trading signals.

q4.a: We never hold your funds. Our bots operate via API keys with trade-only permissions. You maintain full custody of your assets at all times.

q5.a: Yes. All plans are month-to-month with no lock-in. You can cancel anytime from your dashboard and your access continues until the end of the billing period.

q6.a: Free users get community support via Telegram. Pro and above get priority support with typical response times under 2 hours. Elite members have a dedicated account manager.

cta.title: Ready to Trade Smarter?
